author: jsign
content: Yes, we already have full specs for this and also tests.

author: jsign
content: They are in the same branch you've been using for guest program. And also tests in the same eip8025 folder

author: jsign
content: This is how we create the executionWitness field in the fixtures. Basically by specing out how the execution witness is created in execution-specs.

author: jsign
content: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/ec23140720d6a9257a907c470ba1874623bd7b50/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/stateless.py#L28-L48 for the struct. but the rest of the spec code has how is generated.

author: jsign
content: And the `tests/amsterdam/eip-8025` folder has many test files related to border cases of witness generation to cover many angles.
